topic: 基于双目多视角影像的场景三维重建

evidence_gaps: verifier dropped 1 entries not grounded in raw tool output
No explicit binocular/calibrated-stereo dataset (e.g. KITTI, Middlebury, ETH3D) was returned by raw backends; need a manual dataset search.
No end-to-end binocular + multi-view SOTA paper (e.g. patchmatchnet, MVSNet, Vis-MVSNet) appeared in raw output; cross-backend retrieval needs expansion.
No bundle-adjustment / COLMAP integration paper was retrieved; only third-party COLMAP repos surfaced.
